title: ProDec 25m Carpet Protector Roll - Strong Self Adhesive Plastic Carpet Protector, Fully Waterproof Heavy Duty Stair Protection, Clear Sticky Back Plastic Floor Protectors
features: 25m long x 625mm wide self adhesive carpet protection film for temporary carpet protection against dust, dirt and liquid spills such as paint, varnish, paste and more. The sticky carpet protector is puncture resistant and waterproof, ensuring your carpets stay clean during decorating and other building or renovation work

ProDec's adhesive carpet protector roll is easy to apply, requires no special applicator tool and leaves no residue when peeled from the surface. It's the ideal floor covering for painting and other maintenance work
The carpet protector film is coloured yellow so it's also useful for creating walkways so people tread only where you want them to

This floor protector roll is 625mm wide which makes it ideal as a stair carpet protector - it's also safer than dust sheets: it stays in place, gives no trip hazard and is flame retardent for maximum safety against cigarette ash, blowtorch strippings, etc. Self adhesive carpet protector film for use as a stairs carpet protector

The carpet cover protector is not for use with wool carpets, carpets treated with stain protection or surfaces other than carpet such as hard floors or glass (special grades are available from ProDec)
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Simple to use, maximum protection for carpets Easy to apply Carpet Protector is reverse wound with the adhesive on the outside, so it applies easily without the need for any special application tools. It can be put down by hand or put in place and kicked out. Easily trimmed to size To ensure protection right up to the edges of the carpet, the film can be easily trimmed with a sharp knife. Puncture resistant Carpet Protector is able to withstand heavy foot traffic without puncturing, keeping the carpet below clean for up to 14 days after application. Flame retardant For added safety and peace of mind, Carpet Protector is fire retardant, ensuring maximum safety against cigarette ash, blowtorch strippings, etc. Waterproof protection against spills, stains and dirt ProDec Carpet Protector is ideal for keeping carpets clean and free from dust, dirt, spillages, debris and general soiling that occurs during decorating, building work and general maintenance. It's made from self-adhesive polythene film that is reverse wound so it applies easily by hand or foot without the need for any special application tools, and unlike dust sheets that can move around and expose carpets underneath, stays in place once down. It's also safer than dust sheets: it presents no trip hazard and is flame retardant*, ensuring maximum safety against cigarette ash, blowtorch strippings, etc. and its excellent puncture resistance enables it to withstand heavy foot traffic. Carpet Protector guards against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more and can be easily wiped clean if spills do happen. If you're not covering an entire floor, the yellow colour is also useful to mark out walkways and areas where people can step and keep them off unprotected areas. It leaves no adhesive residue when peeled and should be removed within 14 days of application - note that the product is not re-usable once taken up from the surface. Compatibility : this product is not suitable for use with wool carpets or carpets treated with stain protection. It is recommended to try a small, unobtrusive area 48 hours before applying to the main area although it is always best to be sure what the carpet is made from. It is also not for use on surfaces other than carpet such as hard floors or glass. Other grades suitable for these surfaces are available in the ProDec range. *achieves a fire performance rating of BFL-S1 when classified in accordance with EN 13501-1 Carpet Protector Carpet Protector Carpet Protector Hard Floor Protector Hard Floor Protector Hard Floor Protector Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 773 4.1 out of 5 stars 773 4.1 out of 5 stars 773 4.1 out of 5 stars 773 2.3 out of 5 stars 2 — Roll length 20m 25m 50m 20m 25m 50m Width 600mm 625mm 625mm 625mm 625mm 625mm Where to use Carpets (not wool or stain protection treated) Carpets (not wool or stain protection treated) Carpets (not wool or stain protection treated) Ceramic tiles, stone, laminate, timber, parquet, vinyl Ceramic tiles, stone, laminate, timber, parquet, vinyl Ceramic tiles, stone, laminate, timber, parquet, vinyl Colour Yellow Yellow Yellow Clear Clear Clear TEMPORARY PROTECTION SOLUTIONS FROM PRODEC - ProDec has a range of products for protecting floors and furniture during decorating and general maintenance work. Polythene dust sheets Made from waterproof recyclable LDPE material and available in both sheets and rolls, polythene is lightweight and cost-effective. Super Cling Super Cling is waterproof recyclable LDPE material that has been statically charged to enable it to cling to virtually any surface without the need for taping, including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Self-adhesive films Made from puncture resistant polythene that enables it to withstand heavy traffic, ProDec’s self-adhesive film protects against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more. It applies easily without the need for any special application tools and stays in place once down. Available in Carpet, Hard Floor and Glass grades. Cotton dust sheets Classic cotton twill fabric that soaks up small splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. Available in a range of sizes in both standard and Protector waterproof plastic backed versions.
